lines.raw: Don't drop it! | 不要摔掉它！

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答问题。

lines.english: Where does Sam put the vase in the end?
lines.chinese: 萨姆最后把花瓶放在了哪里？
lines.raw: Where does Sam put the vase in the end? | 萨姆最后把花瓶放在了哪里？

lines.english: What are you going to do with that vase, Penny?
lines.chinese: 你打算怎样处置那个花瓶，彭妮？
lines.raw: What are you going to do with that vase, Penny? | 你打算怎样处置那个花瓶，彭妮？

lines.english: I'm going to put it on this table, Sam.
lines.chinese: 萨姆，我准备把它放在这张桌子上。
lines.raw: I'm going to put it on this table, Sam. | 萨姆，我准备把它放在这张桌子上。
Don't do that. | 不要那样做。
Give it to me. | 把它给我。

lines.english: What are you going to do with it?
lines.raw: What are you going to do with it? | 你打算怎么处置它？

lines.english: I'm going to put it here, in front of the window.
lines.chinese: 我准备把它放在这儿，窗户前面。
lines.raw: I'm going to put it here, in front of the window. | 我准备把它放在这儿，窗户前面。
Be careful! Don't drop it! | 小心！别把它摔了！
Don't put it there, Sam. | 萨姆，别把它放在那儿。

lines.english: Put it here, on this shelf.
lines.chinese: 把它放在这儿，这个架子上。
lines.raw: Put it here, on this shelf. | 把它放在这儿，这个架子上。
It's a lovely vase. | 这是一个漂亮的花瓶。
Those flowers are lovely, too. | 那些花也很漂亮。
